title: Source PrintManager print to hole step

notes: One-player JS oracle canary for PrintManager.test toggling from printing true to a hole.
p0 starts printing with an active PrintManager at distance 1 and moves 1.6 units, so PrintManager.test subtracts 1.6, updates lastX/lastY, and toggles printing off.

The trail cursor starts at the post-step point to keep Avatar.update from adding a normal trail point before the PrintManager toggle; the only point event is the important toggle point, and the trail is then cleared by setPrinting(false).
The JS oracle fixes Math.random at 0.5, so the new hole distance is 5.25.

This fixture is verified through the narrow Python source-print-manager-canary runner and common trace includes avatar.printing, printManager internals, body/trail counters, and property payloads for this slice.
